text:
- Add LICENSE
- Support staging
- Convert USE_BZIP2 and USE_GMAKE to USES
- Add USES=libtool
- Use new OPTIONS features

All ode consumer ports build fine with these changes.

Port maintainer (acm@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
